blocks.code:
; EDIT THESE: two starting numbers. Longest Collatz chain wins.
(define A 27)
(define B 97)
(define (collatz n)
  (if (= n 1) (list 1)
      (if (= (modulo n 2) 0)
          (append (list n) (collatz (floor (/ n 2))))
          (append (list n) (collatz (+ (* 3 n) 1))))))
(define path-a (collatz A))
(define path-b (collatz B))
(define (peak lst) (reduce (lambda (a b) (if (> a b) a b)) lst))
(define result
  (cond ((> (length path-a) (length path-b))
         (string-append (number->string A) " WINS (length " (number->string (length path-a)) ")"))
        ((< (length path-a) (length path-b))
         (string-append (number->string B) " WINS (length " (number->string (length path-b)) ")"))
        (else "TIE")))
(list (list "A" A)
      (list "A-length" (length path-a))
      (list "A-peak" (peak path-a))
      (list "B" B)
      (list "B-length" (length path-b))
      (list "B-peak" (peak path-b))
      (list "WINNER" result))

; EDIT THESE: two starting numbers. Longest Collatz chain wins.
(define A 27)
(define B 97)
(define (collatz n)
  (if (= n 1) (list 1)
      (if (= (modulo n 2) 0)
          (append (list n) (collatz (floor (/ n 2))))
          (append (list n) (collatz (+ (* 3 n) 1))))))
(define path-a (collatz A))
(define path-b (collatz B))
(define (peak lst) (reduce (lambda (a b) (if (> a b) a b)) lst))
(define result
  (cond ((> (length path-a) (length path-b))
         (string-append (number->string A) " WINS (length " (number->string (length path-a)) ")"))
        ((< (length path-a) (length path-b))
         (string-append (number->string B) " WINS (length " (number->string (length path-b)) ")"))
        (else "TIE")))
(list (list "A" A)
      (list "A-length" (length path-a))
      (list "A-peak" (peak path-a))
      (list "B" B)
      (list "B-length" (length path-b))
      (list "B-peak" (peak path-b))
